purpose: Dog chatbot live QA cases 1-100 for OpenAI fact extraction, NutriTail rule checks, Food V2 grounding, and customer-facing answer quality.

batch.notes: Extracted from C:\Users\NIOstb\Desktop\chatobot cases.odt. Expected signals are intentionally broad regression checks, not final answer scripts.

cases.prompt: Έχω ημίαιμο κουτάβι 4 μηνών, 8kg, θα γίνει περίπου 15kg. Θέλω ξηρά τροφή.
